description: SDD-guided production recommender work. US-001 through US-003 completed the initial requirements, design, and task breakdown; this batch starts implementation with offline validation scaffolding before behavior changes.

userStories.title: Create production recommender requirements
userStories.description: Create the initial SDD requirements document for refactoring the production recommender into reusable modules.
acceptanceCriteria: Create specs/production-recommender/requirements.md
Use SHALL, MUST, and WHEN ... THE SYSTEM SHALL ... wording
Cover source problem parsing, retrieval, scoring, explanation, artifact output, and Slack compatibility
State that score components MUST be inspectable
Do not change production Python code
userStories.notes: Created specs/production-recommender/requirements.md and validated required SHALL/MUST language.

userStories.title: Create production recommender design
userStories.description: Create a design document for the production recommender refactor based on the approved requirements.
acceptanceCriteria: Create specs/production-recommender/design.md
Include architecture, constraints, data flow, tradeoffs, and affected modules
Distinguish current NumPy production path from Evaluation_100 experiments
Include validation strategy and observability notes
Do not change production Python code
userStories.notes: Created specs/production-recommender/design.md with architecture, constraints, data flow, tradeoffs, validation, and observability.

userStories.title: Create production recommender task breakdown
userStories.description: Create a deterministic task list for implementing the production recommender refactor safely.
acceptanceCriteria: Create specs/production-recommender/tasks.md
Use checkbox-based sequential tasks
Each task is independently testable
Tasks start with tests or validation scaffolding before behavior changes
Do not change production Python code
userStories.notes: Created specs/production-recommender/tasks.md with sequential independently testable tasks that start with validation scaffolding.

userStories.title: Add recommendation artifact schema fixture and validation
userStories.description: Add offline fixture and validation coverage for the existing recommendation_map.json contract before any production behavior changes.
acceptanceCriteria: Create a production recommender fixture directory under tests/fixtures/production_recommender
Add a sample Slack-compatible recommendation_map fixture with top-level id, title, tags, and recommendations fields
Add offline validation that checks recommendation item fields id, title, difficulty, similarity, and ai_comment
Do not modify production Python code
Do not require OpenAI, Slack, S3, Docker, FAISS, PyTorch, or sentence-transformers

userStories.title: Add Slack compatibility validation for recommendation_map.json
userStories.description: Add offline Slack formatter validation that proves the light job can consume the current recommendation artifact contract without sending live Slack messages.
acceptanceCriteria: Add tests for DailyReviewBot.build_slack_block using the fixture recommendation map
Verify empty or missing recommendations are handled safely
Verify additive recommendation fields do not break Slack formatting
Do not send live Slack messages or require SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL
Preserve existing recommendation_map.json compatibility

userStories.title: Extract recommender schemas
userStories.description: Add standard-library recommender schemas for source problems, index records, score components, recommendation items, and recommendation maps.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/rag/schemas.py with typed or dataclass-style contracts
Preserve current artifact fields required by Slack
Support additive score fields without breaking current JSON consumers
Add schema serialization tests
Do not introduce Pydantic unless separately justified

userStories.title: Extract retriever module while preserving NumPy behavior
userStories.description: Extract NumPy index loading and dense retrieval into a reusable retriever module while preserving current squared L2 behavior.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/rag/retriever.py
Load vectors.npy and metadata.json from configurable paths
Validate missing files and vector/metadata length mismatches clearly
Preserve squared L2 retrieval behavior and expose raw dense distance
Support deterministic top-k retrieval for tests
Do not introduce FAISS, PyTorch, or sentence-transformers

userStories.title: Extract scoring and explanation components
userStories.description: Extract duplicate filtering, inspectable score mapping, and explanation fallback behavior into reusable components without changing production ranking.
acceptanceCriteria: Create or update src/rag/scoring.py for duplicate filtering and score component mapping
Create src/rag/explainer.py for Korean explanation generation and stable fallback behavior
Preserve current title-cleaning and duplicate-title filtering behavior
Preserve existing similarity and ai_comment artifact fields
Add offline tests using fake explainer or fake LLM clients
Do not require live OpenAI calls

userStories.title: Wire generate_index_map.py through the production recommender module
userStories.description: Introduce the recommender orchestration module and make the heavy job call it while preserving current artifact output and environment compatibility.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/rag/recommender.py orchestration for recommend_many
Update src/main/generate_index_map.py as a thin wrapper around the recommender
Preserve REPO_ROOT, TARGET_SUBDIR, OUTPUT_DIR, ARTIFACT_FILE, and current exit-code behavior
Preserve Slack-compatible recommendation_map.json fields
Validate with offline fixtures and fake embeddings; do not require live OpenAI calls

userStories.title: Add production evaluation entrypoint
userStories.description: Add a deterministic production evaluation entrypoint or adapter that calls the production recommender path without treating Evaluation_100 as production code.
acceptanceCriteria: Add an evaluation adapter or script for deterministic production recommender evaluation
Document the ground truth input and deterministic mode requirement
Keep Evaluation_100 clearly separated from production implementation
Do not change production ranking behavior in this story
Do not require live OpenAI calls for unit-level validation
